writer: Warren Adler, Darryl Ponicsan, Kurt Luedtke
actors: Harrison Ford, Kristin Scott Thomas, Charles S. Dutton
plot: After the death of their loved ones in a tragic plane crash, Police Sergeant Dutch Van Den Broek (Harrison Ford) and U.S. Representative Kay Chandler (Dame Kristin Scott Thomas) find keys in the possessions their loved ones left behind. They realize the two had been having an affair and are determined to discover all of the details.
